raw_entries.text: Match ends, Scotland 0, Morocco 1.
Foul by Anthony Ralston (Scotland).
Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Second Half ends, Scotland 0, Morocco 1.
Corner, Scotland. Conceded by Chadi Riad.
Attempt missed. Ayoube Amaimouni-Echghouyab (Morocco) left footed shot from the right side of the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Chemsdine Talbi following a fast break.
Attempt missed. Chemsdine Talbi (Morocco) left footed shot from the left side of the box is just a bit too high. Assisted by Samir El Mourabet following a fast break.
Attempt blocked. Chemsdine Talbi (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Samir El Mourabet.
Substitution, Morocco. Samir El Mourabet replaces Azzedine Ounahi.
Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.
Substitution, Scotland. Anthony Ralston replaces Nathan Patterson.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Scotland. Ross Stewart replaces John McGinn.
Attempt blocked. Scott McTominay (Scotland) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked.
Delay in match because of an injury Yassine Bounou (Morocco).
Attempt missed. Lyndon Dykes (Scotland) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by John McGinn with a cross following a corner.
Lewis Ferguson (Scotland) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Soufiane Rahimi (Morocco).
Attempt blocked. Scott McTominay (Scotland) right footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Kenny McLean.
Substitution, Morocco. Soufiane Rahimi replaces Ismael Saibari.
Substitution, Morocco. Chemsdine Talbi replaces Bilal El Khannouss.
Substitution, Morocco. Ayoube Amaimouni-Echghouyab replaces Brahim Díaz.
Foul by Ayoube Amaimouni-Echghouyab (Morocco).
John McGinn (Scotland) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Brahim Díaz (Morocco).
Foul by Ben Gannon-Doak (Scotland).
Yassine Bounou (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Scott McTominay (Scotland).
Brahim Díaz (Morocco) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Substitution, Scotland. Lyndon Dykes replaces Ché Adams.
Substitution, Scotland. Kenny McLean replaces Ryan Christie.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Foul by Andy Robertson (Scotland).
Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Andy Robertson (Scotland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Attempt missed. Ryan Christie (Scotland) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Scott McTominay.
Noussair Mazraoui (Morocco) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt missed. Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Neil El Aynaoui.
Substitution, Scotland. Ben Gannon-Doak replaces Kieran Tierney because of an injury.
Delay in match because of an injury Kieran Tierney (Scotland).
Attempt blocked. Brahim Díaz (Morocco) right footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Azzedine Ounahi.
Foul by Lewis Ferguson (Scotland).
Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco) header from a difficult angle on the right is saved in the top right corner by Angus Gunn (Scotland). Assisted by Achraf Hakimi with a cross.
Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Grant Hanley.
Attempt blocked. Ismael Saibari (Morocco) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Bilal El Khannouss.
Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Jack Hendry.
Second Half begins Scotland 0, Morocco 1.
First Half ends, Scotland 0, Morocco 1.
Attempt blocked. Kieran Tierney (Scotland) left footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Ché Adams.
Attempt missed. John McGinn (Scotland) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Andy Robertson with a cross.
Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.
Foul by John McGinn (Scotland).
Noussair Mazraoui (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
John McGinn (Scotland) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Foul by Noussair Mazraoui (Morocco).
Handball by Ayyoub Bouaddi (Morocco).
Offside, Scotland. Grant Hanley is caught offside.
Attempt missed. Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) right footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Brahim Díaz with a cross.
Kieran Tierney (Scotland) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco).
Attempt missed. Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco) right footed shot from the left side of the box is too high. Assisted by Ismael Saibari.
Delay in match because of an injury Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco).
Attempt missed. Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco) right footed shot from the right side of the box is too high. Assisted by Brahim Díaz.
Foul by Kieran Tierney (Scotland).
Ché Adams (Scotland) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Foul by Issa Diop (Morocco).
Issa Diop (Morocco) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Kieran Tierney.
Attempt blocked. Ayyoub Bouaddi (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.
Handball by John McGinn (Scotland).
Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Ché Adams.
Brahim Díaz (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Goal! Scotland 0, Morocco 1. Ismael Saibari (Morocco) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Brahim Díaz with a through ball.
First Half begins.
Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
